title: Queezy
description: Simple Create & Exploration Modpack originally created for a private server.
body:
**Queezy emphasises my two favourite things in Minecraft, *Exploration and Automation*, while keeping the good parts of vanilla.**

The only major mod Queezy adds is Create—everything else is meant to enhance challenges and let you focus on the fun stuff. Ideally, you'll find that you'll get to the interesting challenges quickly, be it complex industrial chains or exciting dungeon crawling.

At the same time, I am careful not to make the good stuff too easy. For instance, you no longer have to travel tedious distances to points of interest, but making an iron farm is still a good bit of effort.

This modpack also doesn't force you into a certain playstyle. If you don't like automation or you don't want to explore, no problem; neither is a requirement to do the other (but it does help). If you play with friends it's even better: Your individual progress will advance the group as a whole :)

### Here's what Queezy does:
* enable automation through the amazing Create mod
* remove tedious barriers that commonly occur during gameplay, through both quality of life changes and new game mechanics
* make travelling more interesting by adding new structures and biomes to discover
* reward exploration with powerful und useful loot
* enhance Minecraft's atmosphere and ambience
* allow immersive, cooperative multiplayer (with spatial voice chat support)
* maintain an engaging experience throughout the early-, mid-, and late-game

I originally created Queezy for a group of friends on a private server. The pack is currently in a semi-public play testing phase. Things may break in future versions.

#### Notes for setting up a server
This modpack uses Simple Voice Chat, meaning that you need to make sure its port is accessible (24454 UDP by default).
